problem.description: Evocarelab uses medical-grade biocellulose and nanotechnology to ensure that active ingredients don't just stay on the stratum corneum, but penetrate where they really matter.

product.defaultDesc: A masterpiece of molecular synthesis. Our biocellulose mask uses three hyaluronic acid weights for three-dimensional regeneration.
product.textureQuote: Ultra-fine medical-grade biocellulose for perfect molecular contact.

ingredients.title: Molecular
ingredients.ing1_desc: Rapidly hydrates the stratum corneum and instantly relieves dryness and tightness.
ingredients.ing2_desc: Ultra-small molecules that penetrate deeply and increase the structural hydration level.
ingredients.ing3_desc: Improves skin adhesion and moisture retention capacity, prolonging the hydrating effect.

main.name: Sodium Hyaluronate
main.description: Its high molecular weight structure forms a non-occlusive viscoelastic film on the epidermal surface, intelligently regulating transepidermal water evaporation and providing immediate hygroscopic relief.

main.name: Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid
main.description: Low molecular weight nano-molecules that cross the lipid barrier to interact with deep keratinocytes, stimulating the biological synthesis of collagen and elastin.

main.name: Acetylated Sodium Hyaluronate
main.description: Known as 'Super Hyaluronic Acid', its acetylated modification increases lipophilic affinity, allowing a molecular anchorage that doubles water retention and repairs cellular cohesion.

secondary.name: β-glucan
secondary.description: Derived from biotechnological yeasts, this polysaccharide acts by activating Dectin-1 receptors on macrophages. Clinical studies show a 30% acceleration in stratum corneum repair and a significant reduction in transepidermal water loss (TEWL).

secondary.name: Trehalose
secondary.description: A 'survival' molecule that replaces water in cell membranes during extreme water stress. Its chemical structure prevents the denaturation of structural proteins, acting as a protective shield against cellular aggregation.

secondary.name: Glycosaminoglycans
secondary.description: Fundamental components of the dermal scaffolding. They act as biological precursors that increase the density of the extracellular matrix, improving turgidity and elasticity by stabilizing collagen and elastin fibers.

howtouse.title: The art of
howtouse.step0_desc: Your skin is unique. Apply a small amount behind the ear and wait 24 to 48 hours to ensure perfect harmony with your dermis.
howtouse.step1_desc: Deeply clean your skin to ensure maximum absorption of micronutrients.
howtouse.step2_desc: Spread the mask over a clean face for 15–20 minutes.
howtouse.step3_desc: Use 2–3 times per week or according to your skin's specific needs.
howtouse.step4_desc: Remove and massage the excess essence for a smooth, plump, and radiant finish.

philosophy.title: The Philosophy of the
philosophy.intro: Born from an obsession: the perfect intersection between advanced biotechnology and pure aesthetics. At Evocarelab, we don't formulate cosmetics; we develop molecular solutions.
philosophy.pilar1_desc: Every formula is subjected to rigorous stability and clinical efficacy tests. We don't believe in miracles; we believe in bioavailable molecules and measurable results.
philosophy.pilar2_desc: Our approach to cosmetics mimics the biological structure of skin. We formulate to complement the hydrolipidic mantle, not to alter it.
philosophy.pilar3_desc: We select pharmaceutical-grade ingredients (USP/EP). We filter impurities, eliminate unnecessary fragrances, and maximize the concentration of pure actives.
philosophy.section_p1: We operate from our laboratory in Madrid with a singular mission: to raise the standard of personal care through materials science and advanced formulation.
philosophy.section_p2: Unlike traditional cosmetics that stay on the surface, our hydrocolloid technology was originally designed for medical applications of wound healing. We have refined that same principle for intact skin, creating a sealed microenvironment that forces active molecules to penetrate the skin barrier.
philosophy.section_p3: We don’t sell hope in a jar. We deliver results based on thermodynamic and biochemical principles.

secret.title: The Secret of the
secret.intro: Forget cloth masks. Our intelligent hydrocolloid matrix is not a soaked fabric; it is a solid system of bioactives that melts with your skin.
secret.section_p1: The secret lies in the physical state of the product. We start with a super-concentrated gel of hyaluronic acid, hydrolyzed collagen, and peptides, which through a polymerization process, we solidify into a flexible matrix.
secret.section_p2: When the mask comes into contact with your face, your skin's natural temperature begins to slowly melt this matrix, making it transparent over the hours while the nutrients penetrate directly into the dermis.
secret.feat1_desc: The occlusive matrix forces the skin to absorb the essence up to 400% deeper than traditional paper masks.
secret.feat2_desc: Bioactives do not evaporate. They are infused drop by drop during the 3-4 hours of application.
secret.feat3_desc: The material reacts to your skin's basal heat, melting organically over the pores for a perfect anatomical adaptation.
secret.visual_desc: The visual proof of absorption. You will know it has finished its work when the thickness has been reduced and the mask becomes as transparent as glass.

ritual.title: Your Personal
ritual.step1_desc: Deeply clean your skin to ensure maximum absorption of micronutrients. An impeccable canvas is the first requirement of Evocarelab biotechnology.
ritual.step2_desc: Spread the mask over a clean face for 15–20 minutes. Allow the hyaluronic acid matrix to interact with your body temperature for precise delivery.
ritual.step3_desc: Use 2–3 times per week or according to your skin's specific needs. Consistency is the key to reprogramming long-term cellular response.
ritual.step4_desc: Remove and massage the excess essence for a smooth, plump, and radiant finish. The final result of cellular architecture made visible.
ritual.safety_desc: Every skin is a unique biological ecosystem. Although our formula is clinical-grade and highly tolerated, we recommend a contact test: apply a minimum amount of essence behind the earlobe and allow 24 to 48 hours for waiting. The absence of reactivity will confirm perfect synchrony with your cellular architecture.
ritual.final_desc: The Evocarelab Science ritual is not just about beauty. It is the daily commitment to your cellular architecture.

product.scienceDesc: Our mask is not a simple surface application. It is a patented active delivery system that interacts with your skin temperature for optimal permeabilization.
product.tech1_desc: Hydrogel that becomes transparent as active ingredients are absorbed by the dermis.
product.tech2_desc: Reacts to body heat for a controlled and constant release of nutrients.
product.clinicalTitle: Results you can see and feel.
product.clinicalFooter: *Results based on clinical tests performed on 50 women during 4 weeks of continuous use (2 weekly sessions).
product.protocolDesc: Evocarelab's scientific excellence is based on biological personalization. Before your first full immersion, we advise applying a minimum dose of essence in the retroauricular area (behind the ear). A waiting period of 24 to 48 hours will confirm the perfect compatibility of our actives with your cellular architecture.
